name: Shoji
description: A paper screen at dusk: the wooden lattice holds still while lamplight and evening blue bloom through different panes on every redraw.

code.style: --pane: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( border-top: calc(22px / @Y) solid var(--color1); border-left: calc(22px / @Y) solid var(--color1); box-sizing: border-box; @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--pane); opacity: @rand(0.5, 0.95); } transition: ease 800ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
